steps.title: Compare the two lengths
steps.content: The notes give two specific trail lengths: the George S. Mickelson Trail is 109 miles long, and the Cannon Valley Trail is 19.7 miles long. A comparison must include both values and their relationship.

steps.title: Reject weak comparisons
steps.content: A mentions only the Mickelson Trail's length and focuses on origin. B falsely says the trails are nearly identical in length. C is too vague and gives no numbers. The clear comparison states both lengths and says the Mickelson Trail is much longer. The answer is D.
